zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Corbet於1229年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Thomas de Corbet48歲，母親Isabella de Valletort26歲。他於1252年與Joan de Mortimer在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1300年8月10日在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾麗頓 白 內斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Corbet was born in 1229, in Shropshire, England, his father, Thomas de Corbet, was 48 and his mother, Isabella de Valletort, was 26. He married Joan de Mortimer in 1252, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 August 1300, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Joan de Mortimer en 1252, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 août 1300, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Caus Castle, Leighton by Neston, Cheshir: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Peter Corbet(이)가 1229년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Corbet(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Valletort(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Joan de Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1300년 8월 10일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에 묻혔다.

ru.Caus Castle, Leighton by Neston, Cheshir: лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Corbet родился в 1229 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Corbet было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Valletort, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Mortimer в 1252 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 августа 1300 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
